raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint regarding a missing refund that has not been properly handled. 

I was charged {$120.00} by XXXX XXXX in XXXX for a membership that I had already cancelled in XXXX and did not authorize. 

XXXX XXXX has informed me that a refund for this charge was already issued back to my credit card issuer, Citibank. However, I have not received this refund, and Citibank states they can not locate it. 

I contacted both parties multiple times. XXXX XXXX claims the refund is already processed, while Citibank refuses to investigate further or locate the funds. 

As a result, I am left without my money, and neither party is taking responsibility. 

I am requesting Citibank to conduct a full investigation, trace the refund transaction, and credit my account accordingly.
